title: Fabrication & painting of Steel Tubular Pipes for MUGHARRAQ PORT – MARINE DEVELOPMENT
content:
Project Name: Fabrication & painting of Steel Tubular Pipes for MUGHARRAQ PORT – MARINE DEVELOPMENT.
Client: ARCELOR MITTAL / ABUDHABI PORTS.
Project code: 4020006.
Description: Scope - Fabrication of 1370mm Dia x 20mm Thk x 21.1 mtr Long Tubular Piles 175 nos by Joining 12 mtr to 9.1 mtr Long Tubular Pile & Welding of C9 Interlocks 2 nos on each Pile Pipe along 16 mtr length.
Location: Abu Dhabi.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Marine.
Status: Completed.
Duration: Jan 2020 – Feb 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
